top_signals.title: Putin and Xi to discuss huge gas project at Beijing summit
top_signals.summary: Talks on Power of Siberia 2 pipeline come just days after Donald Trump’s visit to China
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC’s innovation exemption for tokenized stocks to come as early as this week: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: The SEC has approved several entities to move forward with tokenized stock initiatives, including the NYSE and Nasdaq.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk loses case against Sam Altman over OpenAI’s overhaul
top_signals.summary: The Tesla CEO had claimed that Altman's leadership betrayed OpenAI's mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
